name: US export controls on advanced chips
description: Government restrictions on selling advanced semiconductors and chipmaking equipment to China and other restricted markets

name: Geopolitical concentration in Taiwan
description: Dependence on manufacturing capacity located in Taiwan and exposure to China-Taiwan tensions

name: China revenue exposure
description: A significant share of revenue comes from China and is vulnerable to trade tensions and retaliation

name: Reliance on a small number of suppliers
description: Dependence on one or a few suppliers or foundries for critical manufacturing steps or components

name: Dependence on a small number of large customers
description: A large share of revenue comes from a handful of customers whose loss would materially hurt results

name: Semiconductor industry cyclicality
description: Exposure to boom-and-bust demand and pricing cycles characteristic of the semiconductor industry
